description: Canonical schema URI registry for all LuhTech Holdings schemas. Maps schema roles to versioned files. v1.10.0: patent schema family (SBPA) promoted to registry.

changes: Adds FollowUpRecord.relatedDecisions (array<string>, pattern d-YYYY-MM-DD-slug) — formalizes existing pattern in 9 live FUs across FU-AGENT, FU-EB, FU-OPERATOR, FU-FEATURE prefixes

Adds meta.byStatus and meta.byPriority (integer count maps) — regularizes the summary-counts pattern already carried in live register instances; distinct from indexes.byStatus/byPriority which hold full id lists
Source: pipeline-quality arc 2026-05-30 schema-conformance audit; matches FU-FEATURE-DEC-INFRA-GRAPH-ARCHITECTURE cross-repo (Ectropy-Business consumer) per Erik direction 2026-05-30

venture-summary: REMOVED from registry — deprecated derived artifact, no longer canonical (FU-VENTURE-SUMMARY-SCHEMA-SYNC-1, FU-VENTURE-SUMMARY-DOWNSTREAM-MIGRATION-1). Schema file moves to _archive per deprecation lifecycle.
Consumers (dashboard-sync, dataroom-sync) migrating off venture-summary.json per FU-VENTURE-SUMMARY-DOWNSTREAM-MIGRATION-1
roadmap pointer: v3.3.0 -> v3.4.0 (active version; EB instance already authored to v3.4 fields)
roadmap-business pointer: v2.1.0 -> v2.3.0 (active version; EB instance schemaVersion 2.3.0)
Removed roadmap-business.schema.v3.0.draft.json (not deployed; extensions+serviceTiers parked; FU-ROADMAP-BUSINESS-V3-DRAFT-PROMOTION-1 closed won't-do)
cis/ namespace: NEW — 3 schemas for B-T operational config files
cis/assessment-sync-config.schema.json (v1.0.0): strategic assessment sync to Notion
cis/cis-infra-changelog.schema.json (v1.0.0): CIS infrastructure change audit ledger
roadmap schema: v3.3 → v3.4 (formalizes `serviceExchanges` and `primaryServiceExchange` on feature objects per DEC-SVX-001)
New canonical enum: `_enums/service-exchange.enum.json` (9 SNx members: GSx, CSx, PSx, HSx, RSx, ASx, ESx, MSx, ISx)
Deprecates `xaasServices` and `xaasServicePrimary` on feature objects — both still accepted in v3.4 with `deprecated: true` markers; removed in v4.0
Note: personaRelevance continues to ride on additionalProperties:true; not formalized in this revision
patent schema family: NEW namespace — 7 schemas under schemas/patent/ promoted from luh-tech/LuhTech-business
Schemas: figure-sidecar, glossary, glossary-entry, manifest, portfolio, prior-art-entry, provisional
Closes C1 of B-T patent stabilization cycle
follow-up-register schema: NEW entry — https://schemas.luh.tech/follow-up-register.schema.json (promoted to canonical in PR #5)
decision-log schema: NEW entry — https://schemas.luh.tech/decision-log.schema.v2.json (v2 is portfolio standard; v1 retained for backward-compat only)
Convention note: new entries use URL form for `id` field (matching canonical $id of hosted schema); existing URN-form entries are not retroactively changed
roadmap schema: v3.2 → v3.3 (adds optional `provides: array[string]` and `lifecyclePhases: array[integer 0-7]` on feature objects)
Source: requires/provides matching infrastructure in business-tools (5bd5c4c3) — capabilities.json, challenges.json, lifecycle-phases.json
Note: xaasServices, xaasServicePrimary, personaRelevance continue to ride on additionalProperties:true and are intentionally NOT formalized in this revision; a future schema version may regularize.
roadmap schema: v3.1 → v3.2 (adds required `scope` field on feature objects — product/infrastructure/enterprise-tool/standard enum)
Source: ECTROPY-OPENCORE-STRATEGY-2026-04-16 Decision 1 — Phase A schema introduction for scope classification
roadmap schema: v2.4 → v3.1 (adds mission/vision/currentStage/overallProgress to venture block)
venture-summary schema: v1.0 → v2.0 (adds required meta provenance block, DERIVED ARTIFACT warning)
transform-template schema: v1.0 (NEW) — governs transform template file format
Source: Transform Fabric Architecture Strategy v2.0.0 — 2026-02-26

ComputedValue.description: Standalone, importable JSON Schema definition for the ComputedValue pattern.

acronyms-catalog.description: Schema governing the canonical LuhTech vocabulary served at https://schemas.luh.tech/acronyms-catalog.json.

agent-prompt.description: Structured agent handoff and reference documentation for LuhTech ventures.

architecture-roadmap.description: Technical architecture roadmap schema for LuhTech portfolio ventures.

boundaries.description: Fork tracking and code boundary definitions for ventures that inherit from platform or parent ventures.

cis-assessment-sync-config.description: Strategic assessment dashboard sync configuration — n8n webhook config and Notion sync targets.

cis-infra-changelog.description: CIS infrastructure changelog — structured audit ledger for CI, terraform, deploy, registry, and droplet changes.

cis-url-catalog.description: LuhTech domain and URL catalog — per-venture Cloudflare account assignments, migration status, URL endpoints. Replaces luh.tech/schemas/url-catalog-v2.json.

decision-log.description: Enhanced ADR with governance, voting, indexes, and implementation tracking. Portfolio-wide standard. v1 (decision-log.schema.json) retained for backward-compat only.

deliverable.description: The DELIVERABLE contract — schema-bound unit of work. Declares scope, acceptance criteria, authority, lifecycle state, and audit trail. Replaces prose-in-markdown deliverable specs.

dependencies.description: Cross-venture dependency tracking for portfolio-wide coordination and conflict detection.

deprecation-header.description: Schema-bound deprecation marker for portfolio schemas.

evidence-session.description: Structured evidence and investigation tracking for LuhTech ventures.

extensions.description: Venture-specific extensions with explicit sharing control.

feature.description: Schema for FEATURE.json files that define feature specifications, milestones, deliverables, and business value tracking.

follow-up-register.description: Follow-up item tracking — open work, deferred actions, cross-repo coordination. Adopted portfolio-wide.

infrastructure-catalog.description: Standardized infrastructure documentation for LuhTech ventures.

interfaces.description: Schema for interfaces.json files that define MCP tool signatures, REST API endpoints, GraphQL resolvers, and middleware specifications for features.

metrics-pipeline.description: Schema for robust metrics collection, failure handling, and multi-destination reporting following luh-tech enterprise patterns.

pm-authority-level.description: Defines the 7-tier authority cascade for construction project decisions.

pm-consequence.description: Tracks downstream effects of PM decisions including schedule delays, cost increases, safety risks, and other impacts.

pm-decision.description: Construction project decision with voxel attachment and 7-tier authority cascade.

pm-inspection.description: Field inspection records that validate PM decisions and voxel completion.

pm-participant.description: Project stakeholders who interact with PM decisions, voxels, and inspections.

pm-schedule-proposal.description: Modifications to the 10-day look-ahead schedule triggered by PM decisions.

pm-voxel.description: 3D spatial container for PM decisions, labor tracking, materials, and carbon footprint.

portfolio-brand.description: Schema-first brand configuration for LuhTech portfolio ventures.

portfolio-dashboard.description: Schema-first configuration for portfolio dashboards including Mermaid diagrams, metrics, and sync settings.

portfolio-extensions-matrix.description: Portfolio-level tracking of which extensions each venture shares with Holdings.

portfolio-graph.description: Portfolio-wide graph structure for cross-venture relationships, dependency tracking, and entity linking.

portfolio-ip-assets.description: Comprehensive intellectual property tracking for all portfolio ventures including patents, trademarks, copyrights, and trade secrets.

portfolio-portfolio.description: Holdings-level schema capturing the complete LuhTech venture portfolio structure, strategic narrative, cross-venture relationships, IP assets, and key relationships.

portfolio-user-metrics.description: Schema-first definition for user funnel, engagement, and email metrics.

portfolio-workflow-registry.description: Canonical workflow definitions for portfolio-level operations.

resource-access.description: Canonical credential and resource-access record. Single home for resource -> vault item -> consumer linkage across LuhTech ventures.

roadmap.description: Technical canonical source — team-visible roadmap data. v3.4 formalizes serviceExchanges + primaryServiceExchange on feature objects (DEC-SVX-001); deprecates xaasServices/xaasServicePrimary (removed v4.0).

roadmap-business.description: Business canonical source — founder/investor-only financial and strategic data. v2.3 ComputedValue across financial domains.

rule.description: Schema-bound governance rule. Captures activeTier and terminalTier of automation surface, refinement history, and authority. First-class versioned object replacing prose-in-markdown rule statements.

service-graph-equity-instrument.description: Governs equity allocation from SME or CoE founder contribution to a venture.

service-graph-service-node.description: Defines any resource controlled by the LuhTech Holdings shared pool — AI agents, CoE founder time, platform infrastructure, or shared tooling.

service-graph-venture-edge.description: Defines the draw relationship between a venture and a service node.

skill.description: Schema-bound chat-side skill instance. Pairs with rule instances for mechanical enforcement; governs chat-behavior triggers. JSON canonical, SKILL.md python-generated.

tech-stack.description: Technology stack documentation for LuhTech ventures.

transform-template.description: Template definition for the luhtech-transform CLI. Declares pre/post transforms, validation steps, and target schema bindings.

truth-delivered.description: Schema-bound closure record for a completed deliverable.

workflow-registry.description: Schema for documenting and categorizing GitHub Actions workflows following luh-tech schema-first patterns.

patent.description: Patent portfolio infrastructure (SBPA family) — 7 schemas under patent/ namespace. Owned by LuhTech Holdings.

figure-sidecar.description: Per-figure metadata sidecar. Source of truth for locked reference numerals and Brief Description caption text.

glossary.description: Top-level glossary file. Single source of truth for terminology used across the patent portfolio.

glossary-entry.description: Single canonical term definition. Reusable across patent, marketing, and legal glossaries.

manifest.description: Per-provisional internal sidecar. Records decision log, source inventory, paragraph-to-source map, and changelog. Never filed at USPTO.

portfolio.description: Top-level patent portfolio (umbrella + member provisionals). Single source of truth across all provisionals; derived dashboards regenerate from this file.

prior-art-entry.description: Single prior-art reference with citation, type, relevance, and distinction-from-invention metadata.

provisional.description: Single provisional patent application record. Tracks lifecycle from drafting through USPTO filing.

title: LuhTech Schema Registry v1.27.0
